subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 741911057/240705933 is not a GRB
body:
L. Scotton (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 741911057/240705933 at 22:24:12.27 UT on 05 July 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
